## Language

Which language would you like Code Analyzer to support?

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocking adoption)
- [ ] High (needed for current project)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## Key Features Needed

What analysis features are most important for this language?

- [ ] Function/class/interface detection
- [ ] Import resolution
- [ ] Call graph
- [ ] Route detection
- [ ] Type resolution
- [ ] Decorator/annotation support
